parameter.name: name
parameter.description: The Solace connection name to use.

parameter.name: queueName
parameter.description: Name of the queue to browse.

parameter.name: maxMessages
parameter.description: Maximum number of messages to return (default: 10).

parameter.name: browseTimeout
parameter.description: Maximum time to wait per message read in milliseconds (default: 2000). Browse stops once no message arrives within this window.

parameter.name: selector
parameter.description: Optional JMS-style selector expression to filter messages (e.g., region = 'EU' AND priority > 5).

parameter.name: responseVariable
parameter.description: The name of the variable to which the result JSON (with messages array) is stored.

parameter.name: overwriteBody
parameter.description: Unused for browse — messages are returned via the response variable.
